questions.question: What was New York City called when it was first started by the Dutch?

Why did people from all over the world move to New Amsterdam?
questions.answer: The Dutch let everyone have their own religion

questions.question: What was the main goal of the Dutch West India Company when they built New Amsterdam?

What war had left the colony too damaged to fight back against the British?
What name did the British give to the colony after they took it over from the Dutch?
